title: Resources Deployment Path ($RES)
text: Resources Deployment Path ($RES) The resources deployment path ($RES) is the logical path the deployed runtime objects required by the application, as specified in the [RESOURCES] section of the assignment file. The [RESOURCES] section lists one or more UAR files containing the application resources. $RES points to each listed UAR file. You can check how the $RES path is configured using the /who command line switch. Related Links Application Resources Uniface application resources are the runtime objects, HTML files, images, and other files that make up an application. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
